description: Four-branch topology-protection scan for the clustered Dirac-Kahler braid family, probing grade balance, phase-band edges, symmetry breaking, and weak anisotropy.

summary.interpretation_note: Phase detuning shows a reproducible braid-to-smeared band edge; width asymmetry destabilizes the braid family; grade balance tuning matters and can weaken topology retention.
